About

The rare designer who also builds — and makes.

I'm a South Jersey-based designer, developer, and maker with over 15 years building visual identities, digital products, and hand-crafted objects that last. My background spans graphic design, front-end development, and physical fabrication — which means I can take a brand from concept to code to the real world.

Past clients include Villanova University Athletics and the Philadelphia 76ers. Current work includes reverse gilded glass signs, custom software systems, and a co-founded product company pursuing a patented magnetic glasses hinge.

Services

What I Can Do For You

From first sketch to finished product — one designer who handles the whole picture.

Brand & Identity

Logos, visual systems, and brand guidelines that hold up across print, screen, and the physical world.

  • Logo design & brand identity
  • Business cards & print collateral
  • Brand guidelines & style guides
  • Signage & environmental design

From $750 / project

Web Design & Dev

Hand-coded sites and apps built for performance and polish — no bloated page builders, no shortcuts.

  • Custom HTML / CSS / JS sites
  • React web applications
  • WordPress builds & themes
  • UI/UX design & prototyping

From $1,200 / project

Custom Signage

Hand-lettered reverse gilded glass signs — the kind that become the centerpiece of a room.

  • Reverse glass gilding
  • Gold & silver leaf application
  • Custom lettering & illustration
  • Custom framing & finishing

From $275 / piece

Contact

Let's build
something worth keeping.

Whether you need a full brand, a custom-built website, or a one-of-a-kind sign for your wall — I'd love to hear about the project. Most engagements start with a free 30-minute call.
